children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Validate and parse the command string to determine the operation to execute
children.behavior: Check command is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'; return parsed command type

children.name: ValidateOrderData
children.purpose: Validate order_data structure and required fields based on command type
children.behavior: Check required fields exist and have correct types; for 'place' ensure items list non-empty; for 'cancel' and 'track' ensure order_id present
children.signature: def ValidateOrderData(command_type: str, order_data: dict) -> dict

children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'place' order workflow: validate inventory, charge payment, reserve stock, create order, send notification
children.behavior: Check item availability and stock, charge payment via payment gateway, reserve inventory, create order record, send confirmation notification; rollback on failure
children.signature: def PlaceOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database, inventory: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Create order record, read existing orders for conflict check
Read stock levels, write reserved_count and stock_count
Create payment record, read payment status

data_operations.description: Create new order record, read existing orders
Read stock, decrement stock, increment reserved
Create payment record, read payment status

constraints.description: Must rollback all writes if any step fails

acceptance_criteria.description: Inventory stock decremented and reserved updated

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'cancel' order workflow: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update order status
children.behavior: Lookup order, check status not shipped, refund payment, restore reserved inventory, update order status to cancelled; rollback on failure
children.signature: def CancelOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database, inventory: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read order status, update order status to cancelled
Read reserved_count, restore stock_count, decrement reserved_count
Read payment record, update payment status to refunded

data_operations.description: Read reserved, restore stock, decrement reserved
Read payment, update status to refunded

constraints.description: Must rollback all writes if any step fails

acceptance_criteria.description: Inventory stock restored and reserved decremented

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'track' order workflow: return current order status and estimated delivery time
children.behavior: Lookup order by order_id, retrieve status and estimated delivery, return result
children.signature: def TrackOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read order status and delivery info

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns order status and estimated delivery time

children.name: FormatResult
children.purpose: Format the operation result into the standard output JSON structure
children.behavior: Take success, order_id, status, message from child operation and construct final output dict

acceptance_criteria.description: Output conforms to expected JSON schema

governance_notes: Parent global_vars orders, inventory, payments are all read_write. ParseCommand, ValidateOrderData, and FormatResult are pure functions with no data store access. PlaceOrder and CancelOrder each cover read_write on all three stores. TrackOrder covers read on orders only. The union of child global_vars covers all parent required operations: orders read_write (PlaceOrder, CancelOrder, TrackOrder), inventory read_write (PlaceOrder, CancelOrder), payments read_write (PlaceOrder, CancelOrder). No parent operation is dropped.
